_note: Mirrors bell_geometry_preset()/build_profile() in c/bell.c — keep in sync. All lengths in metres. shape: 0 flaring bell, 1 straight tube, 2 hemispherical bowl. The meridian is sampled crown(top)->mouth(bottom); thickness tapers thicker toward the mouth/soundbow.

bowl.about: singing bowl — long, pure, beating partials

glass.about: thin glass — pair with the glass material
